overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban plaza transitioning into a narrow commercial street. The scene features golden hour lighting with long shadows, neon signs, digital billboards, and a mix of brutalist and high-tech architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with massive digital billboards and elevated transit structures

events.description: camera turns left away from the sunlit building facade and begins walking down the commercial street

agents.ego_description: turning away from the large billboard-covered building and proceeding into the narrower street

entered.detail: massive angular building with large illuminated digital screens displaying advertisements
raised concrete transitway with support pillars running parallel to the plaza
large rectangular planter containing spiky tropical plants
glowing billboard displays showing product advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The clip opens in a sunlit urban plaza facing a massive brutalist tower covered in digital billboards. The golden hour sun creates a strong backlight effect. The camera turns left and begins walking past concrete planters with tropical plants, moving toward a narrower commercial street with elevated transit structures visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with overhead pedestrian bridges

events.description: moves from open sunlit plaza into the shaded commercial street with overhead enclosed walkways

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the covered pedestrian street between commercial buildings

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the street level
row of shops with metal shutters, neon signs, and entranceways
black metal railings and red bollards lining the right side of the walkway
metal roll-down doors with colorful spray paint and tags

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrower commercial street sheltered by overhead pedestrian bridges. The lighting becomes a mix of fading natural light and emerging neon signs from the storefronts. The street is empty of pedestrians, with metal barriers lining the right side and graffiti-covered shutters on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with outdoor seating and illuminated storefronts

events.description: approaching an outdoor couch placed on the sidewalk with a seated individual

agents.ego_description: walking past a seated NPC on outdoor furniture, observing the neon-lit storefront details

notable_agents.action: overweight man sitting on a black leather couch outside a store, looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: black leather couch placed directly on the sidewalk pavement
yellow illuminated neon sign reading 'OPEN' in a shop window
metal security shutters with 'SALE' and '70% OFF' painted in large letters

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a distinctive scene where an NPC sits on a leather couch placed on the sidewalk. Neon signs including a bright yellow 'OPEN' sign illuminate the storefront. The street remains narrow with overhead structures receding behind, and trash bags are visible near the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with parked vehicles and digital advertising

events.description: passing parked futuristic vehicles while continuing deeper into the commercial district

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past parked cars and illuminated advertising screens

entered.detail: red and black sleek sports car parked along the curb with futuristic design
large illuminated billboard displaying a person's face in advertisement
tall futuristic high-rise buildings visible at the end of the street corridor

segments.scene_description: The street opens slightly to reveal parked futuristic vehicles and more digital advertising. A red sports car sits parked on the right while a large digital screen displays advertisements. The view extends toward distant skyscrapers at the end of the commercial corridor, with neon signs continuing to line the storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sun-drenched urban plaza into a narrow, neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins facing a massive brutalist tower draped in digital billboards under a strong golden hour backlight, before turning left to pass concrete planters and tropical greenery. As the camera moves forward, the open plaza gives way to a sheltered street beneath overhead pedestrian bridges, where the natural light fades and is replaced by the glow of neon storefronts and graffiti-covered shutters. The scene then shifts toward a sidewalk where an NPC sits on a leather couch beneath a bright yellow open sign, with trash bags lining the curb. Finally, the corridor opens slightly to reveal parked futuristic vehicles, including a red sports car, as the view extends toward distant skyscrapers framed by towering digital advertisements.
